text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as the Osaka Hai draws near...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Is Oguri running in the Osaka Hai?
choice_data_list: I hear she's healing from a sprain.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that it's apparently not serious, but it's
best for Oguri Cap to rest and take care of
herself.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I see. At any rate, defeating Oguri when she's not
at her best would be meaningless.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'll wait for my chance to face her once she's
healed.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Fuji, can I ask about all the boxes piled up in the
front hall?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, those are all for Oguri. I was about to bring
them to her room.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'll help.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! The two of us should have it finished in
no time!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You're a lifesaver, Yaeno. You even unpacked
everything for me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It was no problem. There are so many boxes, we
would've had to start stacking them up on your
bed otherwise.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And they're all from your fans... I have to say I
was surprised at the amount.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I guess they heard about my injury somehow.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Listen to this. "This pillow is for your leg so you
can reduce the weight you put on it. I hope you
can put it to good use and get lots of rest."

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Isn't that nice? I feel better already.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: The support of my fans always gives me strength.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I can see that you really value them.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I really do. Especially Tome and Shige. I wouldn't
be here without the support of everyone in
Kasamatsu.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh. And Yone sent some pickled vegetables. Do
you want some?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
What?! I could never be so presumptuous as to
take your precious food.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It's my thanks for your help today. Yone's pickles
are really good.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
In that case... I can't refuse. Would you like me to
serve it up for us with some rice and homemade
miso soup?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yes! Please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crunch, crunch... Munch, munch.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for the pickles. The seasoning was just
right.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yone must've poured a lot of care into making
them delicious for you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. That's why I feel so warm when I eat
them. It's the same for all of the gifts I get.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I feel lost, I just remember this warm
feeling and then I feel energized.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...All right, time for seconds. I have to eat up if I
want this injury to heal quickly.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That's right. I'm eagerly awaiting your return as
well, so please take care of yourself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Finally, the day of the Osaka Hai arrives.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oguri may not be running today, but Creek is. I
raced her in the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho... It still stings when I think of my
shameful performance there.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I told Chiyono O and Ardan that I would do them
proud, but I was unable to keep my word...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: But today, I will!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'll make them both proud!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'll remind the world that the three of us are here,
and I won't disgrace myself again!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'll wield this obsession and my fierce blaze with
utmost skill! By the power of water's tranquility,
victory will be mine!
choice_data_list: All right! Show 'em what you've got!
All right! Show 'em what you've got!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Osu!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki is looking good today! She's
imposing, but I like it.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
She's definitely cool, but I still think Super
Creek's gonna win.

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Super Creek is on the same level as Oguri
Cap—she's super strong!

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text:
The same level as Oguri, huh? This should be a
great race!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(Oguri isn't even here, but people are still talking
about her prowess...)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(My goal hasn't changed either. Even though
Chiyono O and Ardan aren't here, I won't let
anyone forget them...)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I will burn myself into the eyes of everyone
watching and save a place for their return!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: To that end, I will surpass you today!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I shall claim your renown for myself!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. I would hate to see that happen. It would
mean so much to my fans if I won today.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But I have to say... There's something different
about you than at the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's like... you have a new, unbending core inside
of you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, I commend you on your powers of
observation.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I have a feeling this is going to be a great
race.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I agree. Now...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: May the best racer win!
